name: @oscharko-dev/keiko
description: Enterprise model-agnostic developer-assist coding agent for regulated engineering workflows.

scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-contracts run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-security run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-quality-intelligence run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-model-gateway run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-workspace run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-tools run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-evidence run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-local-knowledge run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-memory-vault run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-memory-capture run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-memory-consolidation run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-memory-governance run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-memory-retrieval run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-harness run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-workflows run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-server run build && npm --workspace @oscharko-dev/keiko-cli run build
scripts.conversation:release-check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run arch:check && npm run arch:check:negative && npm test && node dist/cli/index.js --version
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run prepare:bin && npm run build:ui && npm run check:package-surface && npm run check:qi-supply-chain
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run prepare:bin && npm run build:ui && npm run check:package-surface && npm run check:qi-supply-chain
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist coverage packages/keiko-contracts/dist packages/keiko-security/dist packages/keiko-quality-intelligence/dist packages/keiko-model-gateway/dist packages/keiko-workspace/dist packages/keiko-tools/dist packages/keiko-evidence/dist packages/keiko-local-knowledge/dist packages/keiko-harness/dist packages/keiko-workflows/dist packages/keiko-server/dist packages/keiko-cli/dist packages/keiko-memory-vault/dist packages/keiko-memory-capture/dist packages/keiko-memory-consolidation/dist packages/keiko-memory-governance/dist packages/keiko-memory-retrieval/dist packages/keiko-ui/.next packages/keiko-ui/out
